reviews.body:
## Pull request overview This PR standardizes the SDKâ€™s `baseUrl` semantics to be the full API root **including** the `/api/v1` prefix, preventing out-of-the-box 404s when users rely on defaults or copy examples/docs. **Changes:** - Update the default API base URL to `http://localhost:8000/api/v1` and adjust the env-config test expectation accordingly. - Clarify `baseUrl` requirements (must include `/api/v1`) in SDK TypeScript types (`BaseAPIClientOptions`, `OAuthClientOptions`) and in README/examples. - Update example `.env` template and example comments to reflect the corrected base URL convention. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 9 out of 9 changed files in this pull request and generated 2 comments.
Show a summary per file | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | src/oauth-client.ts | Updates `baseUrl` documentation to require `/api/v1` for OAuth endpoints. | | src/env-config.ts | Changes default `HEZOR2_API_BASE_URL` to include `/api/v1` and expands documentation. | | src/base-api-client.ts | Updates `baseUrl` documentation to align with `${baseUrl}${path}` composition (no auto `/api/v1`). | | README.md | Fixes `baseUrl` examples to include `/api/v1` and adds a clarifying comment. | | examples/oauth-device-flow.ts | Updates env var comment to require `/api/v1` and shows corrected default. | | examples/oauth-auth-code.ts | Updates env var comment to require `/api/v1` and shows corrected default. | | examples/connect.ts | Updates env var comment to require `/api/v1`. | | examples/.env.example | Updates example `HEZOR2_API_BASE_URL` to `http://localhost:8000/api/v1`. | | __tests__/env-config.test.ts | Updates expected default base URL to include `/api/v1`. |
